data: How to do a Footprint - Part I - Finding subsidiaries

The foundation of building a footprint is understanding the organizational structure of a company. In this post I will detail my own personal method for enumerating corporate structures and translating those structures into domain names which can be used in subsequent parts of an footprinting process.
Don't believe your lying eyes: Why getting/upgrading a reverse shell is worth it

If you have a command execution (ex. via SQL injection) be sure to spend the time to get a reverse shell from it to avoid headaches and wasting your time. In this post I explore how I learned this lesson the hard way.
